subcodes.first_line: O thou Leaf that moveth with the fragrant breezes of God! The written sheet was perused and from its contents the lamentation
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @consolation and comfort, @pain of love; love as veil, @Ascension of Baha'u'llah, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
